message:
feat: add 'Add more...' button to Enterprise sidebar (#9789)

Enable the addMore feature in EnterpriseSidebar and wire it to
openAddCardModal('dashboards') so users can add dashboards from
the enterprise compliance portal sidebar, matching the main sidebar.

Fixes kubestellar/console#9783

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -23,6 +23,7 @@ import { useDashboardContextOptional } from '../../hooks/useDashboardContext'
 const SIDEBAR_FEATURES = {
   missions: true,
   addCard: true,
+  addMore: true,
   clusterStatus: true,
   collapsePin: true,
   resize: true,
